opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The itching and burning down there are so intense I can't sit still or sleep — it feels like my skin is on fire. Please, I need something to make it stop tonight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on over the last two days and it has got so bad it's stopping me sleeping — I need help urgently.

symptom_narrative.duration: two days and it has escalated quickly
symptom_narrative.character: intense itching and a raw, burning feeling around the outside, with a thick white clumpy discharge like cottage cheese
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable — the worst itch and burning I've had, I can't sit still
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: around the vulva and the vaginal opening, the external skin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse at night, seems to have flared just before my period is due
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — I've tried not to scratch
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: passing urine really stings when it touches the skin, and it hurts during sex
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the thick clumpy discharge and the stinging when I wee; no bad smell that I've noticed
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I think I've had something a bit like this once before, years ago
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sleep and I can't concentrate — I'm really distressed by it

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a sinus infection a couple of weeks ago that I took antibiotics for
past_medical_history.how_managed: a 7-day course of antibiotics, now finished

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: amoxicillin — but I finished the course

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, very distressed and not sleeping because of the symptoms

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-checked with a home thermometer; single reading

objective_data_offered.value: the skin on the outside looks red and a bit puffy and feels raw where I've been irritated
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description of external skin only; no internal examination possible
